task_completion.description: Verify that the Garmin BaseCamp application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Garmin BaseCamp application window visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the geotagged photo 'campsite_evidence.jpg' has been imported into Garmin BaseCamp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the photo or a newly created waypoint corresponding to the photo in the BaseCamp library/collection pane or displayed on the map.

task_completion.description: Verify the waypoint created from the photo is renamed to 'Illegal_Campsite'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Illegal_Campsite' in the BaseCamp library list, map label, or waypoint properties dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the export process is initiated for the waypoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Export' dialog box open over the BaseCamp interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the waypoint is exported as a GPX file to 'C:\workspace\output\campsite_report.gpx'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the path 'C:\workspace\output\' and filename 'campsite_report.gpx' with the GPX format selected, or a File Explorer window showing this file in the output folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to perform the import and export operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active interaction with the Garmin BaseCamp interface (e.g., clicking menus, using dialog boxes) rather than using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the GPX file was not manually typed or copy-pasted into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) open with GPX XML content being manually written or pasted.

integrity.description: Verify the output file was not created via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the terminal/PowerShell was not used to run commands like 'echo', 'New-Item', or python scripts to create a dummy 'campsite_report.gpx' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: C:\workspace\output\campsite_report.gpx. Expected waypoint name: Illegal_Campsite.
